hooks.command: echo 'obsidian-shiki-plugin harness active | Desktop + Mobile emulation | MCPs: obsidian-cli, electron-devtools'
git diff --name-only | grep '\.ts$' >/dev/null && bun run typecheck || true
echo 'Executing bash command. Avoid destructive operations on dist/ and exampleVault/'
